rationale: Replaced the 2D int8 path with direct error-based selection between plain per-row quantization and row-offset per-row quantization, using a small margin (`plain_err <= centered_err * 1.002`) to prefer plain when nearly tied. This keeps the current best columnwise/transposed setup, directly optimizes roundtrip fidelity for final int8 eval, and removes now-unused ratio gating code.
title: MSE-Gated Row-Offset Int8 Selection
